title: Modernized Classic Sponges
description: Bringing the old Sponges into the new game!
body:
### BRING ON THE CHEESE

Ever miss the old Classic/Beta texture of Sponges?

I have. In fact, that's how I spend most of my days.

But going back to that old texture, it's a jarring contrast from the new Minecraft art style. Maybe even a little bit _too_ jarring, at least for me.

So, as a result of my nostalgia, as well as my love for the current style, I decided to combine the two designs into one. The ultimate Sponge, returned to its former glory of looking like a block of cheese, but with new-age Minecraft's iconic, stylish colors and shading techniques.

Enjoy!

Here are the retextures:
![Retextured sponge blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff56f9e5f641d9630cb398a1aec7b23d65ea57c9.png)
